settings.title: Settings
settings.pin_required: Please set a PIN code first
settings.checking_updates_desc: Connecting to server to retrieve the latest version...
settings.up_to_date_desc: The version of Slash you are using is already up to date!
settings.update_ready_desc: The new version has been successfully downloaded and verified. Click relaunch to apply the update!
settings.relaunch_failed_hint: Failed to relaunch. Please restart the application manually.
settings.manage_vaults_desc: Switch between your note vaults or create new ones.
settings.language_desc: Change the display language of the application.
settings.appearance_desc: Adjust the application's theme colors and reading width.
settings.cleanup_desc: Remove unused assets that are no longer referenced in any notes. Files will be moved to .trash folder.
settings.cleanup_none: No unused assets found. Your vault is clean!
settings.cleanup_done: Cleanup complete: Moved {{count}} file(s) to .trash, saved {{space}}.
settings.rebuild_desc: Rescan all assets if files were modified outside the app.
settings.export_diagnostics_desc: Package recent system logs and config files to help us troubleshoot issues. Personal data like API keys will be automatically scrubbed.
settings.embedding_desc: Semantic vectors for note similarity and search.
settings.copied_command: Command copied! Paste in terminal to install.
settings.shortcuts_hint: Click on a shortcut to change it. Press Escape to cancel.
settings.ai_skills_desc: These skills are triggered manually via the magic wand in the editor.
settings.builtin_skills_desc: These skills are triggered manually via the magic wand button in the editor.
settings.skill_embedding_desc: Computes semantic vectors for note similarity
settings.skill_smart_rename_desc: Intelligently suggests note titles based on content
settings.skill_classification_desc: Auto-archives notes to appropriate PARA folders
settings.ai_provider_degraded: Online Service unavailable or missing configuration. Falling back to Local AI.
settings.ai_provider_desc: Configure local and online AI models. Embedding always uses local Ollama.
settings.embedding_section_desc: Slash always uses private Ollama for text embeddings. Must be installed to use semantic search and knowledge discovery.
settings.local_section_desc: Run generation models locally via Ollama. Your data stays on your machine.
settings.online_section_desc: Connect to OpenAI-compatible online API services for generation models.
settings.model_engine_desc: Configure the Ollama service address used to run local models.
settings.model_engine_desc_new: Private model engine. Must be installed to use semantic search and knowledge discovery.
settings.local_section_desc_new: Configure the vector embedding model and the default generative language model used locally.
settings.local_section_desc_combined: Configure the private model engine, vector embedding model for knowledge discovery, and default generation model.
settings.copy_test_cmd_title: Copy detection command: check if Ollama is running
settings.generation_model_hint: Select from local models, or enter a new name to download
settings.generation_model_desc_new: Generative model service. You can install it locally or use a cloud provider.
settings.generation_model_placeholder: Select or enter a model name to download
settings.engine_not_detected: Not detected (install locally or set remote address)
settings.usage_log_desc: View AI skill execution records, timing and status.
settings.whisper_desc: Choose an offline audio/video transcription model. Larger models produce higher quality but require more storage and memory. Slash always uses offline models for transcription. Must be downloaded to use audio/video indexing services.
settings.whisper_unavailable: Speech service not ready. Please ensure Sidecar is running.
settings.whisper_model_tiny: Fastest speed, suitable for simple conversations
settings.whisper_model_small: Good quality, suitable for most scenarios
settings.whisper_model_medium: High quality, suitable for professional transcription
settings.whisper_download_network_error: Unable to reach Hugging Face or any mirror. You can download the model manually and copy it to the cache directory below, then click Refresh:

sidebar.duplicate_name_warning: A note named "{{name}}" already exists in the vault. Please use a different name.
sidebar.team_readonly: 🔒 Team Space is in read-only mode
sidebar.delete_denied_has_other_files:
This directory contains files created by others ({{user}}).
Please notify them to clean up before deleting.

search.no_results_hint: This could be a new topic worth exploring — create a note to start recording your thoughts.
search.no_results_detail: No matches from keyword, semantic, or content scan

customSkills.empty: No custom skills yet. Click above to create one.

customSkills.tpl_mermaid_desc: Create a flowchart or architecture diagram from note content

You are a helpful assistant.
Process the user's text and return improved content.

sync.feature_not_enabled: Feature not enabled, please configure server
sync.no_remote_workspace: No cloud workspace is currently associated with this repository. Choose an option below to start your cloud journey.
sync.title: Slash Server
sync.desc: Connect to Slash Server to sync notes to the cloud
sync.first_use_hint: First-time use will auto-register an account
sync.vault_picker_title: Found existing vaults. Choose which data to sync:
sync.session_terminated: Your login session is no longer valid. Please reconnect or log in again.
sync.session_admin_revoked: You have been signed out by an administrator. Please log in again.
sync.session_forbidden: Your login session is no longer valid, or this account no longer has access to the team space. Please log in again.
sync.physical_disconnected: Network or service is temporarily unavailable. Slash will retry when it recovers.
sync.not_member_error: You have been removed from the team, or you are not a member of this team.
sync.join_team_entry: 🎫 Got an invite code? Join a team →
sync.pair_code_new_generated: New pairing code generated, check Docker logs
sync.pair_code_cooldown: Pairing code service is in cooldown, {{seconds}}s remaining
sync.pair_code_hint: 💡 Use the pairing code from Docker logs for first connection
sync.pair_code_hint_create: 💡 Use the pairing code from Docker logs to create team
sync.choose_mode_title: Connected to cloud, choose how to use it
sync.personal_space_desc: Personal cloud space for storing and syncing your notes. You can enable team space later anytime.
sync.create_team_space_desc: Create a team space for shared knowledge, with personal storage for each team member.
sync.upgrade_requires_login: Please enter your PIN to connect to your personal space before upgrading.
sync.setup_pin_desc: Set a 4-8 digit PIN for quick reconnection on any device
sync.pin_already_set: PIN is set, personal sync is ready
sync.forgot_pin: Forgot PIN? Connect with server pairing code
sync.pair_code_used: Pair code invalid or expired. Please regenerate.
sync.fill_server_and_code: Please enter server URL and pairing code
sync.need_team: Need team collaboration? Enable team space →
sync.login_recovery_observer: Regular users: ask admin to reset your password
sync.admin_forgot_password: Admin forgot password? Click to reset
sync.not_admin_error: This user is not an admin. Please ask an admin to reset your password.
sync.not_team_member: You are not a member of this team. Please ask an admin for an invite code.
sync.reset_admin_desc: Pair code verified. Please set a new username and password.
sync.server_unreachable: Cannot connect to server, please check the URL
sync.join_fill_fields: Please fill in invite code, display name, username and password
sync.probe_has_team: This server already has team "{{teamName}}". Please log in or join with an invite code.
sync.probe_has_personal: This server already has a personal cloud space. Please log in with PIN.
sync.use_pair_code: Connect to a different server with pairing code
sync.vault_conflict_body:
This vault is already bound to a different sync identity:

{{detail}}

Continuing may cause data contamination.
Click "OK" to close vault and return to selector, or "Cancel" to abort.
sync.vault_already_bound_body: This vault is already bound to team "{{existingTeam}}". Continue binding to "{{newTeam}}"?
sync.already_bound_new_vault_prompt: This Vault is already bound to a Team. To create/join a new team, please create a new local Vault. Return to Vault Selector?
sync.disconnect_close_body:
Disconnected from sync. Close this vault and return to selector?

Recommended: Prevents accidental contamination on next login.

team.max_file_size_hint: Set the maximum file size limit for cloud synchronization. Default: 200MB. Max allowed: 10240MB (10GB). This setting applies to all members in the space.
team.revoke_confirm: Are you sure you want to force {{name}} to log out of all devices?
team.revoke_success: Cleared {{count}} sessions. {{name}} has been forced offline.
team.self_revoke_admin_forbidden: You can’t remove your own admin role. Ask another admin to perform this action.
team.dir_observer_hint_on: All Observers can see this directory in sidebar
team.dir_observer_hint: When enabled, team visitors without specific permissions can also view this directory in the tree
team.trash_restore_confirm:
Are you sure you want to restore this file?
It will be restored to its original path. If the path or note name already exists, it will be renamed to (Recover).
team.trash_delete_confirm:
[WARNING] This action cannot be undone!
The file will be permanently deleted from the system.

Are you sure you want to continue?
team.promote_empty_dir:
Cannot push empty directory

"{{name}}" has no note files.

Please add notes (e.g. Readme.md) first.
team.promote_conflict_parent: "{{parent}}" is already promoted. "{{child}}" is a subdirectory and will sync automatically.
team.promote_conflict_child:
"{{child}}" (a subdirectory of "{{parent}}") is already promoted. Promote the parent will cause duplicates.

Please remove "{{child}}" from team first.
team.sidebar_team_empty: Empty directory, use right-click Promote to push content
team.move_blocked: Team directory content cannot be moved. Please keep the team space directory structure intact.
team.admin_delete_file_confirm:
Delete file "{{name}}"?
The file will be moved to trash.
team.admin_delete_dir_confirm:
Delete directory "{{name}}" and all its contents?
This action is irreversible.
team.promote_already_promoted: "{{name}}" is already promoted to Team Space ({{target}}). Cannot promote again.
team.permission_denied_delete_file:
You do not have the required Editor permissions to delete this note.
Please contact the assigned Editor to proceed with this action.
team.permission_denied_move_file:
The team directory structure is protected and currently restricted.
Please do not move files out of their existing locations.
team.permission_denied_delete_dir:
You must be the Owner or a Team Admin to perform a directory deletion.
Please contact the Owner or an Admin to proceed.
team.permission_denied_rename_dir:
You do not have the required permissions to rename this team directory.
Please contact a Team Admin for assistance.
team.maintenance_confirm_body:
During team space maintenance, you can move/rename team directories and files. If a member's sync operation conflicts, the Admin's action will take precedence. During maintenance, Admins cannot directly delete directories or files. Admin's delete operations will automatically rename the file to its original name + (Pre-delete), alerting the original Owner/Editor to handle it as soon as possible.

A single maintenance session lasts 30 minutes, after which it will automatically exit. If unfinished, you can re-enable it.
team.maintenance_no_delete_hint: Cannot delete during maintenance. Move to 04_ARCHIVE/Unsorted instead
team.maintenance_promote_hint: Team is under maintenance, unable to submit
team.storage_cleanup_warning_snapshots: This will clean up cloud snapshots for all members (including personal spaces). You will not be able to revert to these versions after cleanup.
team.storage_cleanup_warning_trash: Trashed files will be permanently lost after cleanup
team.storage_cleanup_warning_orphan: Orphan assets will be permanently deleted. This action is irreversible.
team.storage_legacy_hint: Legacy .slash/ path files from older sync versions, invisible to current clients
team.storage_cleanup_warning_legacy: These are leftover files from older sync versions (.slash/ paths). Current clients can no longer see them. Deleting them won't affect normal operations.
team.storage_cleanup_preview_title: Preview of space to be freed:
team.storage_cleanup_danger_snapshots: Warning: Data will be permanently deleted and cannot be restored from historical snapshots.
team.storage_cleanup_danger_trash: Warning: Data will be permanently deleted and cannot be restored from the team trash.
team.storage_cleanup_danger_legacy: Warning: Data will be permanently deleted and cannot be restored.

import.ai_modal_desc: Media files detected. You can optionally use Vision or Audio Language Models to extract rich text content.

import.ai_route_local_desc: Data stays on your machine, currently ready.
import.ai_route_online_desc: Use your configured online LLM endpoint.
import.hub_desc: Transform any media or link into Markdown.
import.drop_zone_title: Click or drag file to this area

import.run_in_bg_hint: You can process this in the background, we'll notify you when ready
import.log_read_media: Reading and slicing media binary stream...
import.log_analyze_meta: Analyzing file metadata and embedded resources...
import.log_analyze_text: Analyzing regular text and layout structure...
import.log_extract_img: Extracting embedded images and chart features...
import.log_format_md: Validating output format and restructuring to Markdown...
import.whisper_audio_video_notice: Audio/Video will be processed by the built-in local Whisper engine (fast and private), no LLM configuration required.
